episodes.title: Cult Leader Accused of Decade-Long Grooming
episodes.description: A cult leader calling himself “Little Pebble” faces trial in Sydney for allegedly grooming a girl from age six to sixteen to become his wife and mother of forty-five children, claiming divine mission under messages from Jesus and Mary. His wife, Sandra Mathison, stands accused alongside him, with prosecutors revealing coded communications and breaches of supervision orders. The girl testified she believed her role was ordained from childhood, and her mother dismissed her discomfort, insisting Kamm had no impure thoughts. Despite being released from prison in 2014 under strict contact bans, Kamm allegedly continued communicating with her — even predicting she’d bear forty-five children. Both deny guilt, with Kamm’s defense claiming no physical contact and his wife’s defense tying her case to his. The trial continues, unraveling a disturbing tale of manipulation, faith, and control.
